name: c64bridge
description: Stdio-based Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that bridges Commodore 64 Ultimate hardware with AI agents.

C64_MODE.description: Select active backend (c64u for Ultimate hardware, vice for emulator)

C64U_HOST.description: Override the C64 Ultimate host name or IP address

C64U_PORT.description: Override the C64 Ultimate REST port

C64U_PASSWORD.description: Override the C64 Ultimate network password sent as X-Password

C64BRIDGE_DIAGNOSTICS_DIR.description: Override the directory where persistent MCP diagnostics files are written

C64BRIDGE_DISABLE_DIAGNOSTICS.description: Set to 1 to disable persistent diagnostics logging

C64BRIDGE_POLL_MAX_MS.description: Maximum time to poll for program-output validation before timing out in normal runtime mode

C64BRIDGE_POLL_INTERVAL_MS.description: Interval between screen polls during program-output validation in normal runtime mode

C64BRIDGE_POLL_STABILIZE_MS.description: Extra settle time after a successful poll match before considering output stable

C64_TASK_STATE_FILE.description: Override the path used to persist MCP background-task state

RAG_EMBEDDINGS_DIR.description: Directory containing RAG embedding JSON files

RAG_REINDEX_INTERVAL_MS.description: Periodic reindex interval in ms (0 disables)

RAG_BUILD_ON_START.description: Set to 1 to rebuild embeddings on server start

RAG_DOC_FILES.description: Comma-separated extra docs to include in RAG

RAG_DISCOVER_FORCE_REFRESH.description: Set to 1 to ignore cached discovery results when fetching external docs

GITHUB_TOKEN.description: Personal access token used for optional RAG discovery against GitHub

C64_TEST_TARGET.description: Overrides integration tests to hit mock or real hardware (mock|real)

VICE_MODE.description: Default video standard for VICE audio capture (ntsc|pal)

VICE_LIMIT_CYCLES.description: Maximum CPU cycles to render when VICE generates audio

VICE_BINARY.description: VICE binary to launch for managed emulator sessions and audio capture

VICE_DIRECTORY.description: Override the VICE resource directory used for ROM and UI asset discovery

VICE_HOST.description: Override the VICE Binary Monitor host

VICE_PORT.description: Override the VICE Binary Monitor port

VICE_VISIBLE.description: Launch VICE visibly on the desktop instead of headless/Xvfb when possible

VICE_WARP.description: Enable warp mode for managed VICE sessions
VICE_WARP.default: false when visible, true when headless

VICE_ARGS.description: Extra command-line arguments forwarded to managed VICE launches

VICE_RUN_TIMEOUT_MS.description: Timeout for headless VICE runs in milliseconds

FORCE_XVFB.description: Set to 1 to force managed VICE launches to run under Xvfb

DISABLE_XVFB.description: Set to 1 to disable Xvfb fallback and use the current display only

VICE_XVFB_DISPLAY.description: Display number to use when managed VICE launches under Xvfb

SIDPLAY_LIMIT_CYCLES.description: Maximum CPU cycles to render when sidplayfp generates audio

SIDPLAY_BINARY.description: sidplayfp binary to launch when generating audio

SIDPLAYFP_BINARY.description: Legacy alias for SIDPLAY_BINARY (sidplayfp executable name)
